{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Greater Treasure Hall
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Greater Treasure Hall]] is a location accessible to those who reach the [[Jade stage]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
